blended.narrative: Eldora is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,636 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
